title: The Oil Industry (Development) Act, 1974
full_text: The Oil Industry (Development) Act, 1974 तेल उद्योग (विकास ) अधिनियम, 1974 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197447 Act Number: 47 Enactment Date: 1974-09-26 Act Year: 1974 Short Title: The Oil Industry (Development) Act, 1974 Hindi Title: तेल उद्योग (विकास ) अधिनियम, 1974 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of a Board for the development of oil industry and for that purpose to levy a duty of excise on crude oil and natural gas and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas Enforcement Date: 26-09-1974 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Oil Industry (Development) Act, 1974 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II THE OIL INDUSTRY DEVELOPMENT BOARD CHAPTER III FINANCE, ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER IV CONTROL BY THE CENTRAL GOVERNMENT CHAPTER V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and extent. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment and constitution of the Board. Section 4. Conditions of service of members. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Secretary, officers, consultants and employees of the Board. Section 6. Functions of the Board. Section 7. Principles and conditions of assistance. Section 8. Power to call for repayment before agreed period. Section 9. Special provisions for enforcement of claims by the Board. Section 10. Power of Board to appoint Directors of oil industrial concern. Section 11. Effect of notified order appointing Director. Section 12. Powers and duties of the Directors. Section 13. No right to compensation for loss of office. Section 14. Application of Act 1 of 1956. Section 15. Duties of excise. Section 16. Crediting of proceeds of duty to Consolidated Fund of India. Section 17. Grants and loans by the Central Government. Section 18. Oil Industry Development Fund. Section 19. Power to borrow. Section 20. Accounts and audit. Section 21. Power to require persons engaged in oil industry to maintain and produce books, accounts and records relating to business and inspection thereof. Section 22. Directions by the Central Government. Section 22A. Omitted.. Section 23. Penalties Section 24. Other penalties. Section 25. Offences by companies. Section 26. Jurisdiction of courts. Section 27. Previous sanction of Central Government. Section 28. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 29. Dissolution of the Board Section 30. Act to have overriding effect. Section 31. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Schedule 1.
